name: opencut-mcp-server
summary: OpenCut exposes its 1,300+ video-editing routes (silence/filler removal, captions, AI dubbing, scene detection, exports, review bundles, brand kit, etc.) over the Model Context Protocol so AI clients can drive Adobe Premiere Pro pipelines locally and without cloud APIs.

tools.description: Generate an ADR (Automated Dialogue Replacement) cue list from sequence data.
tools.name: opencut_adr_list

tools.description: Auto-duck music volume under speech segments.
tools.name: opencut_audio_duck

tools.description: Apply a chain of audio effects (EQ, reverb, compression, delay, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_audio_effects

tools.description: Enhance audio quality using a preset profile (podcast, music, dialogue).
tools.name: opencut_audio_enhance

tools.description: Isolate dialogue/vocals from background noise and music.
tools.name: opencut_audio_isolate

tools.description: Normalize audio loudness to a target LUFS level.
tools.name: opencut_audio_normalize

tools.description: Generate face-detected zoom keyframes for a push-in zoom effect on talking-head clips.
tools.name: opencut_auto_zoom

tools.description: Export video using a named export preset (social, broadcast, archive, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_batch_export

tools.description: Detect beats in audio and return marker timestamps.
tools.name: opencut_beat_markers

tools.description: Blend two video layers with a compositing mode.
tools.name: opencut_blend_videos

tools.description: Get, save, delete, or preview the local Brand Kit settings.
tools.name: opencut_brand_kit

tools.description: Write a lightweight C2PA provenance sidecar next to a rendered asset.
tools.name: opencut_c2pa_provenance

tools.description: Return OpenCut's FFmpeg, ffprobe, GPU, disk, and Python capability profile.
tools.name: opencut_capability_probe

tools.description: Render animated captions with word-level timing and motion effects.
tools.name: opencut_caption_animated

tools.description: Burn caption segments into video with customizable styling.
tools.name: opencut_caption_burnin

tools.description: Generate karaoke-style word-by-word highlight captions from audio.
tools.name: opencut_caption_karaoke

tools.description: Run the caption QC gate over SRT text or an SRT file.
tools.name: opencut_caption_qc

tools.description: Import an SRT file and convert to timeline caption segments.
tools.name: opencut_caption_srt_import

tools.description: Generate and render styled captions (TikTok, YouTube, cinematic, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_caption_styled

tools.description: Translate existing captions or SRT to a target language.
tools.name: opencut_caption_translate

tools.description: Generate YouTube chapter timestamps from a video transcript using LLM analysis.
tools.name: opencut_chapters

tools.description: Send a natural-language editing instruction to the OpenCut AI agent. The agent interprets the prompt and returns structured edit actions.
tools.name: opencut_chat_edit

tools.description: Apply chroma key (green/blue screen) removal to a video.
tools.name: opencut_chromakey

tools.description: Match the color profile of a source video clip to a reference clip using histogram matching.
tools.name: opencut_color_match

tools.description: Concatenate video files sequentially without re-encoding when possible.
tools.name: opencut_concat_videos

tools.description: Reduce noise from audio/video using FFmpeg filters (afftdn, highpass, gate)
tools.name: opencut_denoise_audio

tools.description: Reduce visual noise in a video using spatial/temporal filtering.
tools.name: opencut_denoise_video

tools.description: List installed dependencies and their versions (FFmpeg, Python packages, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_dependencies

tools.description: Generate a depth map video using Depth Anything V2
tools.name: opencut_depth_map

tools.description: Automatically dub a video into a target language. Transcribes speech with Whisper, translates, synthesises dubbed voices (with optional voice cloning), and can apply lip-sync.
tools.name: opencut_dub_video

tools.description: Generate speech through the optional ElevenLabs cloud TTS integration.
tools.name: opencut_elevenlabs_tts

tools.description: Export/render video with specified codec and quality settings
tools.name: opencut_export_video

tools.description: Enhance/restore faces in video using GFPGAN or CodeFormer
tools.name: opencut_face_enhance

tools.description: Apply AI face reshaping operations such as slim face, enlarge eyes, or smooth jaw.
tools.name: opencut_face_reshape

tools.description: Return the enabled/disabled state of all feature flags.
tools.name: opencut_feature_state

tools.description: Detect and remove filler words (um, uh, like, etc.) from audio.
tools.name: opencut_filler_remove

tools.description: Search indexed media library by spoken content. Returns matching clips with timestamps.
tools.name: opencut_footage_search

tools.description: Generate music with AI (MusicGen instrumental or ACE-Step with vocals+lyrics)
tools.name: opencut_generate_music

tools.description: Return GPU availability, driver version, VRAM, and compute capability.
tools.name: opencut_gpu_status

tools.description: Extract highlight/viral clips using LLM analysis of transcript
tools.name: opencut_highlights

tools.description: Index media files for footage search by transcribing their spoken content.
tools.name: opencut_index_footage

tools.description: Ingest media from a URL for search indexing and processing.
tools.name: opencut_ingest_url

tools.description: Interpolate frames using neural methods to increase video frame rate.
tools.name: opencut_interpolate

tools.description: Check the status of a running OpenCut job
tools.name: opencut_job_status

tools.description: Add letterbox/pillarbox bars to fit a target aspect ratio.
tools.name: opencut_letterbox

tools.description: Animate a portrait image or video to match spoken audio using EchoMimic diffusion-based lip-sync.
tools.name: opencut_lipsync_echomimic

tools.description: Normalize audio loudness (LUFS) across multiple clips to a target level.
tools.name: opencut_loudness_match

tools.description: Apply a LUT (Look-Up Table) color grade to a video.
tools.name: opencut_lut_apply

tools.description: Generate a LUT from a reference image or video for consistent color grading.
tools.name: opencut_lut_generate

tools.description: Parse CSV, Premiere CSV, or EDL markers into OpenCut's normalized marker format.
tools.name: opencut_marker_import

tools.description: Merge multiple video files with optional format conversion.
tools.name: opencut_merge_videos

tools.description: Generate multicam cut decisions from speaker diarization — cuts to the camera angle assigned to whoever is speaking.
tools.name: opencut_multicam_cuts

tools.description: Generate a music cue sheet with timing, rights, and usage data.
tools.name: opencut_music_cue_sheet

tools.description: Parse a natural-language editing instruction into tool calls.
tools.name: opencut_nlp_command

tools.description: Create a picture-in-picture composite with an overlay video.
tools.name: opencut_pip

tools.description: Extract a single preview frame from a video at a given timestamp.
tools.name: opencut_preview_frame

tools.description: Reframe video to a new aspect ratio with smart cropping or padding.
tools.name: opencut_reframe_video

tools.description: Detect and identify repeated/fumbled takes in a video or audio file using transcript similarity analysis.
tools.name: opencut_repeat_detect

tools.description: Build a portable review bundle zip with media, captions, markers, notes, and extra files.
tools.name: opencut_review_bundle

tools.description: Detect scene boundaries/cuts in a video file
tools.name: opencut_scene_detect

tools.description: Search media paths by semantic text query or index media for semantic search.
tools.name: opencut_semantic_search

tools.description: Separate audio into stems (vocals, drums, bass, etc.) using AI
tools.name: opencut_separate_audio

tools.description: One-click pipeline: transcribe + highlight + face-reframe + captions + export short-form clips
tools.name: opencut_shorts_pipeline

tools.description: Detect and remove silent segments from video/audio
tools.name: opencut_silence_remove

tools.description: Retouch skin and blemishes in video using bilateral or GFPGAN-backed processing.
tools.name: opencut_skin_retouch

tools.description: Upscale video through OpenCut's smart backend selector with Lanczos fallback.
tools.name: opencut_smart_upscale

tools.description: Upload a rendered video to a social platform (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_social_upload

tools.description: Match a clip's spectral profile to a reference audio or video file.
tools.name: opencut_spectral_match

tools.description: Change playback speed of a video uniformly.
tools.name: opencut_speed_change

tools.description: Apply speed ramping with keyframes for variable playback speed.
tools.name: opencut_speed_ramp

tools.description: Detect and extract highlight moments from sports or action video using optical-flow motion analysis combined with audio energy scoring.
tools.name: opencut_sports_highlights

tools.description: Stabilize shaky video footage using motion analysis.
tools.name: opencut_stabilize_video

tools.description: Apply style transfer to video (preset styles or arbitrary reference image)
tools.name: opencut_style_transfer

tools.description: Return system information including OS, CPU, RAM, and disk stats.
tools.name: opencut_system_info

tools.description: Batch-rename clips or segments on the timeline.
tools.name: opencut_timeline_batch_rename

tools.description: Auto-cut a video to the beat of its audio track.
tools.name: opencut_timeline_beat_cut

tools.description: Organize timeline clips into smart bins based on rules.
tools.name: opencut_timeline_smart_bins

tools.description: Transcribe video/audio to text with timestamps using Whisper AI
tools.name: opencut_transcribe

tools.description: Apply a transition effect between clips or at cut points.
tools.name: opencut_transitions

tools.description: Trim a video to specified start and end times.
tools.name: opencut_trim_video

tools.description: Generate speech from text (edge-tts, Kokoro, or Chatterbox with voice cloning)
tools.name: opencut_tts

tools.description: AI upscale video using Real-ESRGAN (2x or 4x resolution)
tools.name: opencut_upscale

tools.description: Generate a VFX breakdown sheet from sequence data.
tools.name: opencut_vfx_sheet

tools.description: Apply a video effect (blur, sharpen, vignette, glitch, film grain, etc.).
tools.name: opencut_video_fx

tools.description: List available workflow presets and their descriptions.
tools.name: opencut_workflow_presets

tools.description: Execute a multi-step editing workflow from a preset or custom steps.
tools.name: opencut_workflow_run
